title: AuditTrail
description: Result of `rebar audit show <ticket> --output json` (story 46f0): a ticket's full retained review history. `plan_reviews` and `code_reviews` are always arrays (newest-first, [] when none). `completion` is an object {attestation, sidecar} or null (null only when both are absent). Each `code_reviews` entry is {ticket_id, sidecars: []}.

plan_reviews.description: Retained plan-review REVIEW_RESULT sidecar HISTORY (not the current signed attestation), newest-first; [] if none. Each entry carries `reviewed_at` (ns epoch of the review) so ordering is checkable from the data. To ask whether a plan is approved right now, use `rebar review-plan <id> --status`, not this history view.

completion.description: CompletionRecord {attestation: object|null, sidecar: object|null}, or null when both are absent.

code_reviews.description: Code-review tickets linked via relates_to, each with its own newest-first sidecar history; [] if none.
